caption: The video depicts a man standing at a podium, delivering a speech to an audience seated in front of him. He is wearing a blue shirt with a colorful design and appears to be engaged in his presentation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The setting seems to be an indoor event, possibly a conference or seminar, with wooden blinds covering the windows behind him. The audience members are attentively listening, some with their backs turned to the camera. The room has a formal atmosphere, with audio equipment visible on the left side, suggesting that the event is being recorded or amplified for better sound quality. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, indicating the organization or theme of the event.
